description: README.md is a primary OSS marketing asset per planning.md section 13. Structure: hero section with tagline and badge row (npm version, license, MCP compatible), Why wc-mcp? (3 bullet value props), Quick Start (3 commands: npx wc-mcp, configure mcp.json, reload Claude), Tools Reference table with all 16 tools and 1-line descriptions, Configuration reference table with all McpWcConfig options, Framework support matrix (Lit, FAST, Stencil, any CEM-generating library), Contributing guide, MIT license. CHANGELOG.md with v0.1.0 entry listing all 16 tools. Create .mcp.json.example and mcpwc.config.json.example per planning.md sections 9. Human review required before publish — README quality directly affects OSS adoption.
title: README, CHANGELOG, and example config files
